mapper.sql: SELECT VRA.RESERVATION_ID, VRA.CAFE_ID, VRA.CAFE_NAME , VRA.PHONE , VRA.ROOM_ID, VRA.ROOM_NAME, VRA.TOTAL_MEMBER , VRA.PARTY_ID, VRA.PARTY_NAME , CASE WHEN VRA.LEADER_ID = #{userId} THEN '파티장' ELSE '파티원' END AS PARTY_ROLE , CASE WHEN VRA.CANCEL_AT IS NOT NULL THEN '예약 취소' WHEN VRA.OPEN_AT < SYSDATE THEN '플레이 완료' ELSE '예약 중' END AS RES_STATUS , VRA.RES_OPEN_ID, VRA.OPEN_AT, VRA.BOOKED_AT , FN_GET_ATTEND_STATUS(VRA.RESERVATION_ID, #{userId}) AS ATTEND_STATUS , CASE WHEN VRA.CANCEL_AT IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN FN_GET_USER_ROLE(VRA.RES_OPEN_ID, VRA.CANCEL_USER, VRA.CANCEL_AT) = 'USER' THEN '취소 완료' WHEN FN_GET_USER_ROLE(VRA.RES_OPEN_ID, VRA.CANCEL_USER, VRA.CANCEL_AT) IN ('OWNER', 'MANAGER') THEN '매장 취소' ELSE '알 수 없음' END AS CANCEL_TYPE , VRA.CANCEL_AT AS CANCELED_AT FROM VW_RESERVATION_ALL VRA WHERE VRA.LEADER_ID = #{userId} OR VRA.PARTY_ID IN ( SELECT PA.PARTY_ID FROM PARTY_MEMBER PM JOIN PARTY_APPLY PA ON PM.APPLY_ID = PA.APPLY_ID WHERE PA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT PK.MEMBER_ID FROM PARTY_KICK PK WHERE PK.MEMBER_ID = PM.MEMBER_ID ) )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '예약 중'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '플레이 완료'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '예약 취소'

SELECT RESERVATION_ID, CAFE_ID, CAFE_NAME, PHONE AS CAFE_TEL, ROOM_ID, ROOM_NAME , PARTY_ID, PARTY_NAME , TO_CHAR(OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , TOTAL_MEMBER, PARTY_ROLE FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '예약 중' ORDER BY TO_DATE(OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT RESERVATION_ID, CAFE_ID, CAFE_NAME, PHONE AS CAFE_TEL, ROOM_ID, ROOM_NAME , PARTY_ID, PARTY_NAME , TO_CHAR(OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , ATTEND_STATUS FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '플레이 완료' ORDER BY TO_DATE(OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT RESERVATION_ID, CAFE_ID, CAFE_NAME, PHONE AS CAFE_TEL, ROOM_ID, ROOM_NAME , PARTY_ID, PARTY_NAME , TO_CHAR(OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , CANCEL_TYPE , TO_CHAR(CANCELED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CANCELED_AT FROM (
) WHERE RES_STATUS = '예약 취소' ORDER BY TO_DATE(OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT PD.PARTY_ID, VRA.PARTY_NAME , VRA.CAFE_ID, VRA.CAFE_NAME , VRA.ROOM_ID, VRA.ROOM_NAME , VRA.RES_OPEN_ID , TO_CHAR(VRA.OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , PA.USER_ID, UA.NICKNAME, UI.NAME, UI.EMAIL FROM PARTY_DROP PD JOIN PARTY_APPLY PA ON PD.PARTY_ID = PA.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_MEMBER PM ON PA.APPLY_ID = PM.APPLY_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON PA.USER_ID = UA.USER_ID JOIN USER_INFO UI ON UA.USER_ID = UI.USER_ID JOIN ( SELECT PARTY_ID, PARTY_NAME, CAFE_ID, CAFE_NAME , ROOM_ID, ROOM_NAME, RES_OPEN_ID, OPEN_AT FROM VW_RESERVATION_ALL WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId} ) VRA ON VRA.PARTY_ID = PD.PARTY_ID WHERE PD.PARTY_ID = ( SELECT PARTY_ID FROM RESERVATION WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId} ) AND PM.MEMBER_ID NOT IN( SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM PARTY_KICK ) UNION SELECT PD.PARTY_ID, VRA.PARTY_NAME , VRA.CAFE_ID, VRA.CAFE_NAME , VRA.ROOM_ID, VRA.ROOM_NAME , VRA.RES_OPEN_ID , TO_CHAR(VRA.OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , P.USER_ID, UA.NICKNAME, UI.NAME, UI.EMAIL FROM PARTY_DROP PD JOIN PARTY P ON PD.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON P.USER_ID = UA.USER_ID JOIN USER_INFO UI ON UA.USER_ID = UI.USER_ID JOIN ( SELECT PARTY_ID, PARTY_NAME, CAFE_ID, CAFE_NAME , ROOM_ID, ROOM_NAME, RES_OPEN_ID, OPEN_AT FROM VW_RESERVATION_ALL WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId} ) VRA ON VRA.PARTY_ID = PD.PARTY_ID WHERE PD.PARTY_ID = ( SELECT PARTY_ID FROM RESERVATION WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId} )
